src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster version.
Remove unnecessary whitespace and braces from the annotation interface definition.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with updated Spring Boot auto-configuration rules.
Add annotation to enable Elasticsearch repository scanning for the specific package.
Update import path for LiquibaseProperties to match the new Spring Boot auto-configuration package structure.
Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow updated naming conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where type is obvious.
Extract application name property into a separate variable for cleaner logging statement.
Reformat multi-line string literal to use Java 15+ text block syntax for better readability.
Realign string concatenation in pointcut definitions for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in @Pointcut annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat logger.error calls to use single-line method invocation with multi-line arguments.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved logger(joinPoint).error( to a single line and indented arguments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Prevent potential NullPointerException when logging exception cause in production profile.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed e.getCause() to String.valueOf(e.getCause()) in the else branch.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable initialization.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested configuration class to manage Liquibase-specific properties within the application properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added `public static class Liquibase` with `asyncStart` field and its getter/setter.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Instantiate and expose the new Liquibase configuration object in the main ApplicationProperties class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added `private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase();` and `getLiquibase()` method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Changed the logger field from a non-static instance variable to a static final constant following standard Java logging conventions.
Replaced explicit type declaration with the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference, a feature available since Java 10.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
Rename the constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better semantic clarity.
Remove optional injection of GitProperties as it is no longer used for cache key generation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed 'private GitProperties gitProperties;' field and its '@Autowired' setter method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove optional injection of BuildProperties as it is no longer used for cache key generation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed 'private BuildProperties buildProperties;' field and its '@Autowired' setter method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the custom KeyGenerator bean that relied on the removed Git and Build properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed the '@Bean public KeyGenerator keyGenerator()' method returning 'new PrefixedKeyGenerator(...)'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for JCacheManagerCustomizer to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
Update import for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
Replace wildcard imports with specific imports for Spring Context annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.springframework.context.annotation.*;' with explicit imports for 'Bean' and 'Configuration'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove import for KeyGenerator interface which is no longer used in the class.
Remove import for PrefixedKeyGenerator class which is no longer instantiated.
Remove import for BuildProperties class which is no longer injected.
Remove import for GitProperties class which is no longer injected.
Remove import for Autowired annotation which is no longer used.
Use 'var' keyword for local variable declaration to reduce verbosity.
Reformat Ehcache configuration builder chain for better readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks in the 'Eh107Configuration.fromEhcacheCacheConfiguration' call.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove Elasticsearch repository configuration annotation as part of framework migration.
Enable H2 Console configuration properties for Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Conditionally enable H2 TCP server bean based on configuration property.
Update logger instance to static final field following modern Java conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed private final Logger log to private static final Logger LOG

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use local variable type inference for cleaner code.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed int port to var port

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Refactor logger instance to use static final field convention.
Inject ApplicationProperties to support configurable Liquibase startup behavior.
Allow toggling between synchronous and asynchronous Liquibase initialization based on configuration.
Convert contexts list to comma-delimited string and add null-safety check.
Convert label filter list to comma-delimited string and add null-safety check.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for environment profile checking.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
Change the thrown exception type from JsonProcessingException to JacksonException to match the new Jackson API.
Replace explicit String type with var for local variable declaration to modernize code style.
Replace explicit JHipsterProperties types with var for local variable declarations to modernize code style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl:
var loggingProperties = jHipsterProperties.getLogging();
var logstashProperties = loggingProperties.getLogstash();
